item.title: Unboxing VSPO FES Goods before VSPO FES!
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks VSPO! Related playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct6YHBVRlDpiVcthQEPMSKgp
▼Related Videos▼ Visiting the VSPO Star Wars Collab Cafe: https://youtu.be/GJBbwrBqlDw
▼Related Links▼ Official site: https://event.vspo.jp/vspo-festival-2025/
Timestamps: 0:00 - Intro 0:19 - Acrylic stands 2:17 - Tags 3:08 - Penlight 4:27 - Towel 5:26 - Happi 7:20 - Random cards 13:27 - Plush 14:00 - Final thoughts

item.title: Visiting the VSPO Star Wars Collab Cafe
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Party Time" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks VSPO! item.title: I Fly the World-First VTuber Airplane 【 hololive "ita-plane" 】
item.author: hwikky
item.content:encoded:
🍹 hololive production Cheer UP Pop-up Cafe is now OPEN! 🍰 - From October 18th to December 06th - At ARCANE CAFE in LA (171 Live Oak Ave Suite D, Arcadia, CA 91006) - hololive-themed space inside the Cafe - Exclusive merch, food, drinks, and giveaways ✨ More details here: https://arcanecafe.com/hololive/
+ hololive production Cheer UP FUN RUN: https://x.com/hwikkyofficial/status/1964161634101793214 Go and cheer the hololive fans joining as runners!
⭐ Please follow and support hwikky! Twitter - https://twitter.com/hwikkyofficial Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/hwikky ko-fi - https://www.ko-fi.com/hwikky
#PR #hololiveproductionCheerUPCafe #hololive #ホロライブ

item.title: One VTuber Weeb VS New York City 【 hololive Concert ALL FOR ONE 】
item.author: hwikky
item.content:encoded:
☄️ Hoshimachi Suisei PC Case + Keycap & Desk Pad Bundle Also check out other hololive collab PC stuff. 👉 Get yours here: https://hyte.co/hwikky-hololive
⭐ Please follow and support! Twitter - https://twitter.com/hwikkyofficial Patreon - https://www.patreon.com/hwikky ko-fi - https://www.ko-fi.com/hwikky
credit: Free preview from ‪@hololiveEnglish DAY 1 Free Preview: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HzTiec89h90&t=3281s DAY 2 Free Preview: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h4isKo0FDF8&t=3539s

- Classic Music Credit Music autor: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart Musical interpretation: Advent Chamber Orchestra Music title: Pequeña Serenata Nocturna License: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.es Download: https://lamusicagratis.com/descargar-musica/pequena-serenata-nocturna-allegro

item.title: Visiting the Hololive Afterfes 2025 in Sendai
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Moonside Howl" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks "Goodnight" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks Hololive event/collab vlog playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct5KQkT5pLgMt7m4rtRiKcLl
▼Related Links▼ Official site: https://estream-store.com/lp/hololive_koyasai2025/
